intro: 100 questions to reveal your one-and-only love destiny!
description:
「Ultimate Romance Test」 is a game that comprehensively analyzes your outlook on love and your romantic type by answering 100 questions with four choices.

As you work through the questions, hidden romantic tendencies you never noticed in yourself — and the timing when love is most likely to go your way — will be revealed!

「Wait, so this is my love destiny?」
「So much fun to do with friends!」

Perfect as a tool for reflecting on your own love life, or as a party diagnosis game to enjoy with friends or on stream.

※In handheld mode, you can play with your Nintendo Switch™ held vertically.
※Button controls are also supported, so you can enjoy it in Tabletop Mode and TV Mode too.

———————————————
MASK supports gameplay streamers.
No permission from MASK is required for gameplay streaming, whether personal or commercial.
